statement: In every magma, Equation 288 (`x = ((y * y) * z) * z`) implies Equation 796 (`x = y * (z * ((w * y) * x))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0701
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y y) z) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op (op w y) x)))
